description: A tool that generates a Semantic Version number based on your Git history.

option.name: /allowshallow
tip: Allows GitVersion to run on a shallow clone.

option.name: /b
tip: Name of the branch to use on the remote repository, must be used in combination with /url.

option.name: /c
tip: The commit id to check. If not specified, the latest available commit on the specified branch will be used.

option.name: /config
tip: Path to config file (defaults to GitVersion.yml, GitVersion.yaml, .GitVersion.yml or .GitVersion.yaml).

option.name: /diag
tip: Runs GitVersion with additional diagnostic information; also needs the '/l' argument to specify a logfile or stdout (requires git.exe to be installed).

option.name: /dynamicRepoLocation
tip: By default dynamic repositories will be cloned to %tmp%. Use this switch to override.

option.name: /ensureassemblyinfo
tip: If the assembly info file specified with /updateassemblyinfo is not found, it will be created with these attributes.

option.name: /format
tip: Used in conjunction with /output json, will output a format containing version variables.

option.name: /l
tip: Path to logfile; specify 'console' to emit to stdout.

option.name: /nocache
tip: Bypasses the cache, result will not be written to the cache.

option.name: /nonormalize
tip: Disables normalize step on a build server.

option.name: /output
tip: Determines the output to the console.

option.name: /outputfile
tip: Path to output file. Used in combination with /output 'file'.

option.name: /overrideconfig
tip: Overrides GitVersion config values inline (semicolon-separated key value pairs).

option.name: /p
tip: Password in case authentication is required.

option.name: /showconfig
tip: Outputs the effective GitVersion config in yaml format.

option.name: /showvariable
tip: Used in conjunction with /output json, will output just a particular variable.

option.name: /u
tip: Username in case authentication is required.

option.name: /updateassemblyinfo
tip: Will recursively search for all 'AssemblyInfo.cs' files in the git repo and update them.

option.name: /updateprojectfiles
tip: Will recursively search for all project files (.csproj/.vbproj/.fsproj/.sqlproj) files in the git repo and update them.

option.name: /updatewixversionfile
tip: All the GitVersion variables are written to 'GitVersion_WixVersion.wxi'.

option.name: /verbosity
tip: Specifies the amount of information to be displayed.
